onboardingItems.title: Learn Sign Language
onboardingItems.description: Take lessons, quizzes and challenge yourself daily!

onboardingItems.title: In App Dictionary
onboardingItems.description: Learn new signs and words with the in app dictionary!

onboardingItems.title: Play Minigames
onboardingItems.description: Play minigames to test your skills and have fun!

onboardingItems.title: Track Your Progress
onboardingItems.description: Track your progress and see your achievements!

tutorialPages.title: Start Lessons
tutorialPages.description: Complete structured lessons to build your knowledge from the basics.

tutorialPages.title: Types of Content
tutorialPages.description: Lessons include videos, images, quizzes, and practice tasks.

tutorialPages.title: Track Progress
tutorialPages.description: Review your lesson progress any time.

tutorialPages.title: Quiz Time!
tutorialPages.description: Test your sign language knowledge with interactive quiz questions. Answer questions about signs, meanings, and gestures!

tutorialPages.title: Instant Feedback
tutorialPages.description: Get immediate feedback on your answers! See if you're correct and learn why with detailed explanations for each question.

tutorialPages.title: Earn Stars
tutorialPages.description: Answer correctly and quickly to earn more stars! Build your score and track your progress as you master sign language.

tutorialPages.title: Daily Streak
tutorialPages.description: Take a new quiz every day to sharpen your sign language skills! Challenge yourself with fresh questions daily.

tutorialPages.title: Score Streaks
tutorialPages.description: Build your streak by completing daily streaks! Keep your streak going for maximum rewards and track your consistency.

tutorialPages.title: Learn from Mistakes
tutorialPages.description: Review your answers and explanations for anything you missed. Learn from mistakes to improve your sign language knowledge!

tutorialPages.title: Match Gestures
tutorialPages.description: Flip cards to reveal sign language gestures and their meanings. Match each gesture with its correct word!

tutorialPages.title: See & Learn
tutorialPages.description: Watch the sign language videos on each card. Learn the gestures as you play and improve your matching skills!

tutorialPages.title: Try More Levels!
tutorialPages.description: Complete each level to unlock the next challenge. Try more levels to learn more signs and have fun!

tutorialPages.title: How to Play
tutorialPages.description: Shoot bubbles to match colors and pop them. Clear all bubbles to win the level!

tutorialPages.title: Strategy Matters
tutorialPages.description: Plan your shots carefully! Copy the bubble's color by making the gesture inside it to switch your shooter's color.

tutorialPages.title: Track Your Progress
tutorialPages.description: Complete levels to unlock new challenges. Watch your progress grow as you master each level!

tutorialPages.title: Welcome to Picture Quiz!
tutorialPages.description: Look at the picture and figure out what sign language word it represents. Use finger spelling to spell your answer!

tutorialPages.title: Your Level
tutorialPages.description: Progress through different levels of difficulty. Each level challenges you with new pictures and words to learn!

tutorialPages.title: Your Score
tutorialPages.description: Earn points for correct answers! Track your score and try to beat your best performance as you learn more signs.

tutorialPages.title: Learn to Spell
tutorialPages.description: Spell words by selecting the correct sequence of hand signs. Practice finger spelling to improve your skills!

tutorialPages.title: Get Points
tutorialPages.description: Answer correctly and quickly to earn more points. Speed and accuracy both matter for a high score!

tutorialPages.title: Level Up
tutorialPages.description: Complete levels to unlock new challenges. Level up your skills and take on more difficult spelling sequences!
